creator: sheldonh@iafrica.com
text:
The hier(7) manpage leads one to expect FAQ and handbook
        directories in /usr/share/doc . These are no longer part of
        the base distribution. This will lead to Disappointment and
        Confusion, maybe even The Coming of the Big Three.

Fix: The following patch to the hier.7 source will remove references
        to the FAQ and handbook, thus contributing to Peace and Goodwill
        for all (wo)men.

How-To-Repeat: 
	man 7 hier
